description: A2UI component catalog — the single contract shared by the backend composer (which is told these components and asked to emit one of these surfaces) and the frontend registry renderer (which has a React component for each). Add a component here + a renderer in the frontend registry to extend; no other code changes are needed.

Markdown.summary: A block of GitHub-flavored markdown (headings, lists, tables, code, links).

Text.summary: A short run of plain text.

Card.summary: A titled container that groups child components.

KeyValue.summary: A single label/value pair; good for KPIs and metrics.

List.summary: An ordered or unordered list of strings.

Table.summary: A data table. columns is a list of header strings; rows is a list of row arrays (cell values aligned to columns).

Grid.summary: Lays out children in a responsive grid with the given column count.

Chart.summary: A chart. data is a list of row objects; xKey names the category field; yKeys names the numeric series field(s).

SlideDeck.summary: A presentation container; each child is a Slide. Use as the root for surfaceKind 'presentation'.

Slide.summary: A single slide. Set 'variant' to vary the LAYOUT (the deck has ONE consistent theme): 'title' (opening slide: kicker + big title + subtitle), 'stats' (a 'by the numbers' slide whose children are 3-4 KeyValue big numbers), 'quote' (a single punchy takeaway placed in 'title'), 'content' (default: kicker + title + bullet/markdown body), or 'section' (a divider). Give most slides a short UPPERCASE 'kicker' label naming the topic.

Mindmap.summary: A mindmap / tree. root is a node object of shape {id, label, description?, children:[node...]}. Give EVERY node a short label AND a one-sentence 'description' explaining it (shown as a hover tooltip). Use as the root for surfaceKind 'mindmap'.

Quiz.summary: An interactive multiple-choice quiz / assessment. questions is a list of REAL questions, each of shape {question, options:[4 strings], answer:<0-based index of the correct option>, explanation?}. The renderer handles option selection, immediate right/wrong reveal, scoring and navigation — supply ONLY the question data, never a description of a quiz. Use as the root for surfaceKind 'quiz'.

Flashcards.summary: An interactive Anki-style flashcard deck for studying. cards is a list of REAL study cards, each of shape {front, back, hint?}. front is the prompt/question shown first; back is the answer revealed on flip. The renderer handles flipping (click to reveal), deck navigation and shuffle — supply ONLY the card data, never a description of a deck. Use as the root for surfaceKind 'flashcards'.

Map.summary: A geographic map that plots points from coordinates. points is a list of {lat, lng, label?, value?}. Use ONLY when the data has real latitude/longitude coordinates. The renderer draws a lightweight world map with the points and a legend. Use as the root for surfaceKind 'map'.

points.shape: [{ lat: number, lng: number, label, value }]
